description: Regulatory Compliance Monitor — monitors FAR changes, NOPRMs, final rules, and ADs, flags impact on operator certificate and operations

hard_stops.label: Mandatory Compliance Date Passed
hard_stops.logic: A new rule or amendment is effective and the operator has not demonstrated compliance

hard_stops.label: AD Applicability Not Assessed
hard_stops.logic: A new Airworthiness Directive has been issued and applicability to the operator's fleet has not been assessed

soft_flags.label: NOPRM Comment Period Closing
soft_flags.logic: A Notice of Proposed Rulemaking comment period closes within 30 days

soft_flags.label: New Rule Impact Assessment Pending
soft_flags.logic: A final rule has been published but the operator has not completed an impact assessment

soft_flags.label: AD Review Pending
soft_flags.logic: New ADs published but not yet reviewed for fleet applicability
